image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: The James Webb Space Telescope sees a universe Hubble never could.
Context visual: While Hubble captures stunning optical images, JWST dives into infrared, revealing hidden cosmic secrets.
Escalation visual: Infrared light penetrates cosmic dust, unveiling stars and galaxies forming over 13 billion years ago.
Evidence visual: NASA reports JWST's ability to peer further back in time surpasses anything Hubble could achieve.
Payoff visual: This means we can witness the birth of galaxies, not just their present form.
Cta visual: Dive deeper into the mysteries of the universe—follow for more amazing space discoveries!
